description_long: This is a rectangular wooden fence panel supported by two vertical concrete posts on either side. The fence consists of vertically aligned wooden planks, weathered to a grayish-brown color, and reinforced by two horizontal wooden rails on the back side. The wood shows signs of aging, with some discoloration and minor warping, and the bottom edge has some visible dirt or plant residue. The concrete posts are plain, rectangular, and extend slightly above the top edge of the wooden panel, providing structural stability. The top edge of the fence is flat and unadorned, with no decorative elements or post caps. This type of fence is commonly used in urban and suburban environments to demarcate property boundaries or provide privacy.
description: A weathered wooden fence panel with two horizontal rails, supported by plain concrete posts and featuring a flat, unadorned top edge.
description_view_0: A narrow side view showing the thin profile of the fence and the concrete post.
description_view_1: A front view displaying the vertical wooden planks, weathered surface, and the concrete posts on each side.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the edge of the concrete post.
description_view_3: A rear view highlighting the two horizontal wooden rails and the plain concrete posts.
